data.name: Prostate Clicker: A Touch of Love
data.detailed_description: Prostate clicker is a fun and erotic idle game about clicking on your prostate and generating love.
data.about_the_game: Prostate clicker is a fun and erotic idle game about clicking on your prostate and generating love.
data.short_description: About: Prostate clicker is a fun and erotic idle game about clicking on your prostate and generating love. Features: Robust character creator Reactive prostate and character Action packed, prostate clicking, idle gameplay! Comfy soundtrack

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: No
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: No
